overview: A two-tier web application with a React frontend (web-app) that communicates with a Go backend service exposing a REST API for task CRUD operations. The backend persists tasks in a database and handles all business logic, while the frontend provides an interactive UI for users to add, complete, and delete tasks.
requirements: Users can create new tasks with a text description
Users can view a list of all their tasks
Users can mark tasks as complete or incomplete
Tasks must persist across sessions in a database
The web UI must display task completion status visually
The system must support concurrent users without data conflicts
The backend API must validate task descriptions are non-empty
The system must respond to user actions within 2 seconds under normal load

components.name: tasks-api
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Tasks API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: RESTful API for managing todo tasks
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check endpoint
      operationId: healthCheck
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Service is healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status:
                    type: string
                    example: ok
  /tasks:
    get:
      summary: List all tasks
      operationId: listTasks
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successfully retrieved tasks
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '500':
          description: Internal server error
    post:
      summary: Create a new task
      operationId: createTask
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required:
                - description
              properties:
                description:
                  type: string
                  minLength: 1
                  maxLength: 500
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Task created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '400':
          description: Invalid request - description missing or empty
        '500':
          description: Internal server error
  /tasks/{id}:
    patch:
      summary: Update task completion status
      operationId: updateTask
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required:
                - completed
              properties:
                completed:
                  type: boolean
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Task updated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '404':
          description: Task not found
        '500':
          description: Internal server error
    delete:
      summary: Delete a task
      operationId: deleteTask
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Task deleted successfully
        '404':
          description: Task not found
        '500':
          description: Internal server error
components:
  schemas:
    Task:
      type: object
      required:
        - id
        - description
        - completed
        - createdAt
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: Unique task identifier
        description:
          type: string
          description: Task description text
        completed:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether the task is completed
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: Task creation timestamp
components.componentAgentInstructions: Implement a Go REST API service using net/http that runs on port 9090. Use an in-memory SQLite database (github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3) for task persistence with a 'tasks' table containing columns: id (TEXT PRIMARY KEY), description (TEXT NOT NULL), completed (INTEGER default 0), created_at (DATETIME). Generate UUIDs for task IDs using github.com/google/uuid. Implement CORS middleware to allow requests from any origin with methods GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE. Use proper HTTP status codes: 201 for creation, 204 for deletion, 400 for validation errors, 404 for not found, 500 for server errors. Validate that task descriptions are non-empty strings and trim whitespace. Use prepared statements to prevent SQL injection. Initialize the database schema on startup. Handle database connection errors gracefully. Return JSON responses with appropriate Content-Type headers. Log all errors to stdout. Implement graceful shutdown to close database connections. The /health endpoint should return 200 with {"status":"ok"} when the database is accessible. For PATCH requests, only update the completed field. Ensure the API is stateless - no session management required. Use context for request cancellation. Handle concurrent requests safely with proper database locking.

components.name: tasks-web
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Tasks Web Application
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Frontend web application for todo tasks
paths:
  /:
    get:
      summary: Serve the web application
      operationId: serveApp
      responses:
        '200':
          description: HTML page served successfully
          content:
            text/html:
              schema:
                type: string
components.componentAgentInstructions: Implement a React single-page application using TypeScript and Vite as the build tool. Create a responsive UI with a text input for adding tasks, a list displaying all tasks, and buttons/checkboxes for marking complete and deleting. Use React hooks (useState, useEffect) for state management. Fetch tasks from the tasks-api service on component mount using the /tasks endpoint. The API base URL should be configurable via environment variable VITE_API_URL with a default of http://localhost:9090. Display tasks in a list with visual indicators for completion (e.g., strikethrough text or checkboxes). Implement optimistic UI updates - update the UI immediately and rollback on API errors. Show error messages to users when API calls fail. Include a loading state while fetching initial data. Use fetch API for HTTP requests. Style the application with CSS to be clean and user-friendly - center the content, use readable fonts, add spacing between elements. Implement the following interactions: (1) Text input with a submit button to create tasks via POST /tasks, clear input on success. (2) Clickable tasks or checkboxes to toggle completion via PATCH /tasks/{id}. (3) Delete button per task that calls DELETE /tasks/{id} and removes from UI. Handle edge cases: empty descriptions should show validation error, network failures should display user-friendly messages, prevent duplicate submissions. Use Nginx to serve the built static files in production. Create a Dockerfile with multi-stage build: stage 1 builds the React app with npm, stage 2 uses nginx:alpine to serve the build output. Configure Nginx to serve index.html for all routes (SPA routing). Expose port 80. Include a /health endpoint in Nginx config that returns 200 OK. Add .env support for API URL configuration.
